description: Avatar Render Settings is a component that can be placed anywhere on an avatar for it to work. This component changes the internal camera settings for the first person view for a user wearing an avatar with this component under it by optionally changing the far and/or near clip values of the POV camera.

fields.NearClip: If not null, changes the NearClip of the user's POV camera when this component is under the user's avatar hierarchy.
fields.FarClip: If not null, changes the FarClip of the user's POV camera when this component is under the user's avatar hierarchy.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: This component does not start working on an avatar when added, until the avatar is re-equipped. After this, changing values on the component change what the user sees live. This component can be used to extend the distance a user can see, which by default is 4096 meters multipled by user global scale.
